---
title: "uma-chan's page"
date-modified: last-modified
---

Data Engineering Manager / MLOps Engineer working on data platforms,
developer workflows, and AI-ready tooling.

[Website](https://i9wa4.github.io) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/daikm) | [GitHub](https://github.com/i9wa4) | [X (Twitter)](https://x.com/i9wa4_)

## Start

- [Feed](https://i9wa4.github.io/feed.html)
- [Resume](https://i9wa4.github.io/resume/)
- [Resume (EN)](https://i9wa4.github.io/en/resume/)

## GitHub Stats

[![3-stats](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/i9wa4/i9wa4.github.io/gh-summary/transparent/3-stats.svg)](https://github.com/vn7n24fzkq/github-profile-summary-cards)
[![1-repos-per-language](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/i9wa4/i9wa4.github.io/gh-summary/transparent/1-repos-per-language.svg)](https://github.com/vn7n24fzkq/github-profile-summary-cards)

<div align="left">
  <a href="https://github.com/antonkomarev/github-profile-views-counter">
    <img src="https://komarev.com/ghpvc/?username=i9wa4&label=GitHub_Profile_Views&style=flat"/>
  </a>
</div>
